data.title: Hilco Global gives $47.5M loan for Chattanooga's mixed-use development. Loan supports recapitalization.
data.description: Hilco Global's Real Estate Capital practice recently disclosed the provision of a $47.5 million loan for the recapitalization of a vast mixed-use riverfront development in Chattanooga, Tennessee. This initiative aims to support the redevelopment project by providing essential capital for revitalization and expansion.

data.title: Bristol Myers and Microsoft join forces to use AI tool for early lung cancer detection, leveraging FDA-cleared radiology algorithms in over 80% of U.S. hospitals.
data.description: Bristol Myers Squibb Co, a leading U.S. drug company, has joined forces with Microsoft Inc to enhance early detection of lung cancer. Their collaboration aims to speed up the process by utilizing U.S. FDA-cleared radiology AI algorithms available on Microsoft's Precision Imaging Network. This network, widely used by over 80% of hospitals in the U.S., leverages AI technology to automatically scrutinize X-ray and CT scans. This innovation aids radiologists in spotting elusive lung nodules and identifying patients at earlier stages of the disease.

data.title: Michael Mangione appointed as HNTB's New York office leader, a senior vice president with over 30 years of experience.
data.description: Senior Vice President Michael Mangione has been appointed as the leader of the New York office at HNTB, a prominent player in the transportation industry. With over three decades of experience in the field, Mangione will be responsible for driving strategic growth and enhancing client delivery in the region. This move signifies a strategic effort by HNTB to further solidify its presence in New York.

data.title: Kyiv-based Horizon Capital raises over €150m of €300m target for Catalyst Fund, aiming to mobilize €3bn for key sectors in Ukraine.
data.description: In Davos, Switzerland, on January 20, 2026, Horizon Capital, a prominent private equity company operating in Emerging Europe, announced an Initial Closing for the Horizon Capital Catalyst Fund (HCCF), a reconstruction-focused fund. With $1.8 billion in assets under management, Horizon Capital successfully secured funding for the Catalyst Fund.
ANTHROPIC SEEKS NEW MANHATTAN OFFICE SPACE AS PART OF NYC EXPANSION

data.title: Crow Holdings reveals 245MW data center in central Dallas with 70MW building expected in late 2027, on 40 acres.
data.description: In Dallas today, Crow Holdings revealed plans for a massive data center campus with a capacity of 245MW. This turnkey project will be situated in central Dallas on a well-connected urban infill site in Texas. The multi-building campus is designed to cater to a variety of user needs, both large and small. The first building, offering 70MW power, is projected to be completed by late 2027. The development is a joint effort with CleanArc Data Centers on a currently empty lot, spanning around 40 acres along the Stemmons C.

data.title: Emergent raises $70M, total $100M, from Khosla Ventures & SoftBank to enable software creation for all; 5M users building.
data.description: A rapidly expanding AI software creation platform based in San Francisco, Emergent, has disclosed the successful completion of its Series B funding round, amassing a total of $70 million. The financial backing was contributed by prominent investors including Khosla Ventures and SoftBank Vision Fund 2, alongside Prosus, Lightspeed, Together, and Y Combinator. This recent funding injection brings Emergent's total raised capital to $100 million in just seven months since its inception. The platform currently boasts over 5 million users actively engaged in constructing full-stack, production-ready web and mobile applications.

data.title: Egan-Jones report discusses China-led industry rollups reshaping global competition with skilled workforce.
data.description: A recent commentary by Egan-Jones sheds light on the significant impact of large-scale industry rollups, particularly led by China, on global competition and their implications for institutional investors and risk managers. The analysis points out that the surge in these rollups was initially backed by lower-cost labor and favorable regulations. However, the presence of a vast and competent engineering workforce has propelled advancements beyond initial projections. The commentary emphasizes China's robust position in this dynamic shift.

data.title: Global artificial iris market to reach USD 36.92 million by 2032, with a CAGR of 9.61%. Leading players include Art Eyes, BrightOcular, Ophtec, and others.
data.description: In Dublin, the Artificial Iris Market is on a significant growth trajectory as per ResearchAndMarkets.com, with an increase from USD 17.71 million in 2024 to USD 19.31 million in 2025. Projections indicate it could reach USD 36.92 million by 2032, marking a growth rate of 9.61% CAGR. The convergence of biomedical innovation, consumer preferences, and regulatory changes is paving the way for fresh opportunities in artificial iris technologies.

data.title: Dow Jones plunges 550 points due to Trump's Greenland tariff threats, Amazon and Nvidia also affected.
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones index plummeted by 550 points in response to President Trump's threats of tariffs on Greenland. Nvidia experienced a decline in stock value as Sandisk executed a significant maneuver. The stock market today witnessed a sharp decline in the Dow, with Amazon also experiencing a notable drop. Live coverage reported on this event.

data.title: Alliance Fleet acquires Vital Truck & Van, expanding presence in Illinois and Colorado to better serve customers.
data.description: An Austin, Texas-based private investment firm, Owner Resource Group LLC's affiliates, announced the expansion of their portfolio company, Alliance Fleet. The company acquired Vital Truck & Van, a light commercial vehicle upfitter in Illinois and Colorado. This move aims to enhance customer service through increased geographic presence. Alliance Fleet's acquisition of Vital represents a strategic growth opportunity as Vital is experiencing rapid expansion.

data.title: Elegant Smiles in Atlanta's Toco Hills wins 2026 Top Patient Rated Dentist Award with 1,300+ five-star Google reviews.
data.description: Elegant Smiles, located in Atlanta and Brookhaven, has received acclaim for its artistry-driven cosmetic and restorative dentistry, with more than 1,300 five-star reviews on Google. Renowned for delivering beautiful and healthy smiles, the practice has garnered praise from families in the area. Notable recognition was received by Elegant Smiles on January 20, 2026.

data.title: Smart Alert Tech introduces patented "non-event" notifications, innovative home monitoring tech for safety and independence.
data.description: Smart Alert Tech, based in Orlando, has recently unveiled a new innovation in home monitoring and behavioral technology. The company has received full approval for its patented "non-event notification" system, which aims to assist families in promoting independence and ensuring the safety of their loved ones. This advancement is set to revolutionize the industry by allowing for seamless monitoring without the need for constant alerts. The technology is expected to benefit a significant number of households and is projected to have a widespread impact on the home security market.

data.title: Stephanie Addeo of Rubin Rudman named 'Up & Coming Lawyer' by Massachusetts Lawyers Weekly for 2026.
data.description: In Boston on January 20, 2026, Rubin Rudman shared the news that Stephanie Addeo, a lawyer at the firm specializing in Fiduciary Litigation and Trusts & Estates, has been recognized as a 2026 "Up & Coming Lawyer" by Massachusetts Lawyers Weekly. This accolade celebrates outstanding local attorneys who have demonstrated considerable promise in their field.

data.title: Agrace to build America's first Hogeweyk-inspired Dementia Village in Madison, Wis. revolutionizing memory care.
data.description: Madison, Wisconsin, January 20, 2026 - Agrace, a prominent nonprofit offering hospice care, palliative care, and dementia care services, revealed intentions to construct the Ellen & Peter Johnson Dementia Village at Agrace. This project marks the debut of a Hogeweyk-inspired dementia care community.

data.title: ISACA Awards 2026 recognizes outstanding tech professionals worldwide for their contributions in IT audit, risk, governance, privacy, and cybersecurity.
data.description: In Schaumburg, Illinois, ISACA is recognizing outstanding technology professionals worldwide for their significant contributions to the industry. The 2026 Global Achievement Awards and Hall of Fame induction ceremony celebrate individuals excelling in IT audit, risk, governance, privacy, and cybersecurity. These professionals showcase exceptional dedication, making a remarkable impact on their organizations and communities. Their achievements highlight the crucial role played by ISACA members and tech experts globally.

data.title: Global study by Oliver Wyman Forum reveals shifts in human sentiment, impacts on economy and health. Analysis based on insights from 300,000 Voices project.
data.description: Oliver Wyman Forum, the research arm of the global consulting firm Oliver Wyman and a part of Marsh (NYSE: MRSH), has revealed a new study on consumer and workplace attitudes. Drawing from their extensive five-year-long project, 300,000 Voices, the report titled "300,000 Voices...And What They Tell Us About The Next Era Of Global Change" highlights the impact of geoeconomic and technological changes. These transformations are not only causing emotional stress but are also fundamentally altering societal dynamics.
